name: Tangy Salad Dressing Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all dry ingredients in a bowl and stir until well mixed. Store the mixture in an airtight container.
2. To prepare the dressing, mix 1/4 cup of the dry mixture with 1/2 cup cold water, 1 teaspoon lemon juice, and 3/4 cup mayonnaise or salad dressing. Stir thoroughly until all ingredients are combined.
This makes approximately 1/2 cup of dressing.
